goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'sidney sussex college'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'sunday' and should depart from 'bishops stortford'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 14:15'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called sidney sussex college
Make sure you get attraction type
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on sunday and should depart from bishops stortford
The train should go to cambridge and should leave after 14:15
Make sure you get arrival time
